title: Now Wait for Last Year
author: Philip K. Dick
card_summary: A 1966 novel about a drug called JJ-180 that sends users through time, set against an interstellar war between Earth and two alien races. Dr. Eric Sweetscent must navigate a dying marriage, a tyrannical world leader, and the destabilizing effects of temporal displacement. One of Dick's most admired middle-period novels. 131 pages.
